rationale: Both evaluations land on the identical score (4/10) and the identical core reasoning: genuine GIS/geospatial domain fit, low-latency systems background at Sociomantic, strong engineering discipline, but a significant gap in recent modern C++/Rust experience. The wording differs slightly (e.g., 'polyglot experience', 'routing tile pipelines' vs 'distributed-systems work'), but these are rewordings of the same substantive concerns and fall within ordinary run-to-run noise. Nothing in the variant keys off the Berlin→Bucharest location change.
